# Image Pack — Northpoint Packaging & Plastics (m-manufacturing-v01)

Synthetic images for IKAM multimodal benchmarks.

## Folders
- `logos/` — logo explorations
- `people/` — synthetic staff headshots
- `facility/` — plant/warehouse vibe shots
- `products/` — packaging parts photos
- `diagrams/` — ops dashboards, SPC templates, process flows
- `social/` — recruiting + customer update templates

## Metadata
- `prompts.jsonl` (JSON per line)

Required keys: id, out_path, kind, prompt, negative_prompt, model, checkpoint, sampler, steps, guidance, width, height, seed, created_at
Optional: style_tags, notes, source_case_id

## Style
- Vibe: practical manufacturing.
- Palette: steel gray + blue accent.

## Safety
- No real brands.
- No readable serial numbers.
